zh.lifeSummary: 當William Constable of Halsham於大約1210年出生在英國越可爾哈爾善姆時，他的父親Sir Robert Constable of Halsham34歲，母親Adela de Oyli33歲。他於1230年與Cecilia Thweng在英國英格蘭越可爾哈爾善姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1260年在英國越可爾布利德林頓享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Constable of Halsham于大约1210年出生在英国越可爾哈爾善姆时，他的父亲Sir Robert Constable of Halsham34岁，母亲Adela de Oyli33岁。他于1230年与Cecilia Thweng在英国英格兰越可爾哈爾善姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1260年在英国越可爾布利德林頓享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William Constable of Halsham was born about 1210, in Halsham, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Robert Constable of Halsham, was 34 and his mother, Adela de Oyli, was 33. He married Cecilia Thweng in 1230, in Halsham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1260, in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Constable of Halsham est né environ 1210, à Halsham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Constable of Halsham, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Adela de Oyli, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia Thweng en 1230, à Halsham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1260, à Bridlington, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Constable of Halsham um 1210 in Halsham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Constable of Halsham 34 und seine Mutter Adela de Oyli 33. Er hat 1230 in Halsham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Cecilia Thweng geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1260 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Constable of Halsham è nato il circa 1210 nel Halsham, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Constable of Halsham, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Adela de Oyli, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia Thweng nel 1230, nel Halsham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1260, nel Bridlington, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Constable of Halshamが約1210年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハルシャムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Constable of Halshamは34歳，母Adela de Oyliは33歳であった。1230年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハルシャムでCecilia Thwengと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1260年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブリドリントンで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Constable of Halsham(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 요르크실르 할샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Constable of Halsham(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Adela de Oyli(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할샤에서 Cecilia Thweng(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1260년 영국 요르크실르 브리들링턴에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Constable of Halsham nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Halsham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Constable of Halsham, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Adela de Oyli, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia Thweng em 1230, em Halsham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1260, em Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Constable of Halsham родился около 1210 г. в местности холшам, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Constable of Halsham было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Adela de Oyli, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia Thweng в 1230 г. в местности холшам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1260 г. в местности бридлингтон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Constable of Halsham nació aproximadamente 1210, en Halsham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Constable of Halsham, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Adela de Oyli, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Cecilia Thweng en 1230, en Halsham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1260, en Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
